heading: Definitions
label: 12302 Definitions

Termination of Trust Territory of the Pacific IslandsFor termination of Trust Territory of the Pacific Islands, see note set out preceding , Territories and Insular Possessions.section 1681 of Title 48
amendments: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1990 Amendment note under .Oct. 1, 1990section 1001(a) of Pub. L. 101–501section 8621 of this title

children.heading: Commissioner
children.label: 1 Commissioner
children.text: The term “Commissioner” means the Commissioner of the Administration on Children, Youth, and Families, as established under .section 12311 of this title

children.heading: Council
children.label: 2 Council
children.text: The term “Council” means the Federal Council on Children, Youth, and Families, as established under .section 12314(a) of this title

children.heading: Nonprofit
children.label: 3 Nonprofit
children.text: The term “‘nonprofit”, as applied to any agency, institution, or organization, means an agency, institution, or organization that is, or is owned and operated by, one or more corporations or associations, no part of the net earnings of which may lawfully inure to the benefit of any private shareholder or individual.

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 4 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Health and Human Services.

children.heading: State
children.label: 5 State
children.text: The term “State” includes the District of Columbia, the Virgin Islands, Puerto Rico, Guam, American Samoa, the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands, and the Trust Territory of the Pacific Islands.

children.heading: Young individual
children.label: 6 Young individual
children.text: The term “young individual” means any child or youth from birth to 21 years of age.
